# Proposal: option scoring

## Request

Rank options for the traveller so the best choice is obvious.

## Why now

People compare options by hand today, which is slow and error-prone. A ranked
list makes the strongest choice obvious.

## Acceptance criteria

- ac.option-scoring.options-within-60s — the returned list is sorted by score, highest first, without mutating the caller's input.

## Open questions

None at this time.
